channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: After three months on Linux, I don’t miss Windows at all
item.description: In January I finally made good on my threat/promise to install Linux on my desktop. I wanted to see how far I could get using a Linux PC as my main computer without doing a bunch of research beforehand or troubleshooting afterwards. Since then I have booted into Windows exactly twice: once to scan a […]

item.title: I've worn the Garmin Tactix 8 for 8 weeks, and elite adventurers will love this watch — but most of you probably don't need it
item.description: The Garmin Tactix 8 is the ultimate one-watch solution for tactical operators. With an unbelievable battery life and dedicated tactical features, there's nothing better on the market at the moment.

item.title: What is the release date for The Testaments episode 6 on Hulu and Disney+?
item.description: Episode 5 has been described as "like prom, but full of old creeps." But when does The Testaments episode 6 drop on Hulu and Disney+?

item.title: The RAM crisis just got so bad that YouTubers are making it in their sheds — and our only hope now is a consumer rebellion
item.description: Over the past week, we've suffered a whole lot more pain with RAM pricing, one way or another — and it's unlikely to get any better.

item.title: Spotify just added a feature I've been waiting years for: managing playlist folders on mobile
item.description: Some users of the Spotify apps for Android and iOS are noticing a significant change in how playlists can be managed.

item.title: Éclipse du soleil : l’événement que tout le monde attend pourrait devenir impossible à voir pour certains pour cette raison
item.description: Une éclipse solaire totale sera visible cet été, ce qui attire de nombreux amateurs d'astronomie. Problème : il faut des lunettes spéciales pour l'observer, et elles risquent d'être en pénurie.

item.title: Panneaux solaires : pourquoi les prix continuent de grimper en avril
item.description: Pour le quatrième mois consécutif, les prix des modules photovoltaïques ont encore progressé en avril 2026. Malgré des signaux contradictoires du côté de la production, la tendance haussière ne montre aucun signe d'essoufflement.

item.title: The plan to quietly kill Coyote v. Acme blew up in David Zaslav’s face
item.description: This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more on Hollywood trends and streaming culture, follow Charles Pulliam-Moore. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes on Sundays at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here. How it started Under David Zaslav's leadership, WBD got very […]

item.title: 'It's looking good': I've been testing the LG C6 OLED TV and these are the top 3 things it improves from its predecessor — and one where it still struggles
item.description: The LG C6 looks to be a nice upgrade over the LG C5, so I've picked my three best upgrades and one area where it needs to improve.

item.title: Why aircraft carriers are the best (and worst) place for laser weapons
item.description: High-energy laser weapons are a natural fit for large, power-rich aircraft carriers—with limits. When U.S. Navy leaders declared that “the dream of a laser on every ship can become a real one” earlier this year, they apparently had one particular ship in mind.

item.title: J’ai testé le Poco X8 Pro Max et sa batterie titanesque et il est taillé pour le gaming
item.description: Le dernier smartphone gamer de Xiaomi aligne deux nouveautés de taille : une batterie de 8500 mAh et la nouvelle puce Mediatek haut de gamme : le Dimensity 9500s. De quoi jouer longtemps et dans de bonnes conditions.

item.title: How to use MediaWiki to create and run your own Wiki page
item.description: With MediaWiki, you can create a Wiki installation in just a few steps. Here's how.

item.title: The Best Kindle Accessories (2026): Cases, Page Turners, Stickers
item.description: Looking to better protect your Kindle or add a little personality to your favorite e-reader? From cases and covers to page-turners and even charms, this is the guide for you.

item.title: Ce géant TV de Hisense (85″, 165 Hz, Dolby Atmos) s’allège de 200 euros chez Darty
item.description: Le Hisense 85U7Q Pro est un TV pensé pour toute la famille puisqu'il conviendra aux spectateurs, mais aussi aux gamers grâce au VRR et à l'AMD FreeSync. Pour le rendre plus abordable, il passe de 1 799 euros à 1 599 euros chez Darty.
